CurrentIssues.ID: ArgumentListWrapping:CropOverlay.kt$(left = (crop.left + dx / wPx).coerceIn(0f, crop.right - 0.1f), top = (crop.top + dy / hPx).coerceIn(0f, crop.bottom - 0.1f))
